Package redis.clients.jedis.commands

This package contains the interfaces that contain methods representing Redis core commands.

See: Description

  • Interface Summary 
    Interface Description
    AccessControlLogBinaryCommands
    This class provides the interfaces necessary to interact with Access Control Lists (ACLs) within redis.
    AccessControlLogCommands
    This class provides the interfaces necessary to interact with Access Control Lists (ACLs) within redis.
    ClientBinaryCommands
    The interface contain all the commands about client.
    ClientCommands
    The interface contain all the commands about client.
    ClusterCommands  
    CommandCommands  
    ConfigCommands
    The interface about managing configuration parameters of Redis server.
    ControlBinaryCommands
    The interface about Redis management command
    ControlCommands
    The interface about Redis management command
    DatabaseCommands  
    DatabasePipelineCommands  
    FunctionBinaryCommands  
    FunctionCommands

    HashPipelineCommands

Package redis.clients.jedis.commands Description

This package contains the interfaces that contain methods representing Redis core commands.
